## Checklist

- [ ] `./scripts/validate-all.sh` passes
- [ ] Any price added or changed carries a `[v]` marker and a check date
- [ ] Any price above ~$50/month was verified against the vendor, not recalled
- [ ] New guidance states the requirement it serves, not just that it is good practice
- [ ] Examples regenerated if the template or validator changed

## If this changes a skill's behaviour

Describe the failure mode it fixes. Skills in this repo are tightened in response to observed mistakes, so a change without a named failure mode is hard to evaluate.
